claim: React Day Berlin 2026 takes place December 4 & 7, 2026 in Berlin (hybrid); CFP open until August 12, 2026
quote: React Day Berlin 2026 — December 4 & 7, 2026 — Berlin & Online. CFP is open until August 12, 2026.

claim: Frontmania 2026 CFP closes May 31, 2026; in-person event in Utrecht on October 7, 2026
quote: Opens: February 2, 2026. Closes: May 31, 2026. Status: Open. Speakers expected to attend in person.

claim: code.talks 2026 runs Nov 4–5, 2026 in Hamburg with a dedicated Frontend track among 13 areas; CFP submissions accepted at cfp.codetalks.com
quote: 4th & 5th November 2026 in Hamburg, Germany at KINOPOLIS HafenCity. Highly curated tracks: GenAI & LLMs, Architecture, Cloud, Security, Frontend, Product, Data, Culture, Craft, DevEx, Science, Impact, Geek-Out, Newcomer.

claim: DevFest Paris 2026 CFP is officially open with submissions accepted until June 30; event is November 27, 2026 in Nanterre
quote: Le CFP est officiellement OUVERT — submissions accepted until June 30. Event date: November 27, 2026 at La Fabrique de la Connaissance, Nanterre-Université.

claim: DevFest Belgium 2026 CFP is open via Conference Hall; lists Mobile & Web Development category covering Material design, accessibility, PWA, frameworks
quote: Mobile & Web Development — Material design, Accessibility, PWA, frameworks, integration. Submit a proposal.

claim: Frontmania 2026 is a frontend-only conference at Jaarbeurs Utrecht on October 7, 2026; topic areas include new & fancy, BFF, methodology, AI, future
quote: Frontmania 2026 — for and by frontend developers. Five main areas: New & fancy, Backend for frontend, Methodology & culture, Artificial intelligence, The future is now.

claim: Aggregator listing showing currently open CFP deadlines for React Day Berlin (Aug 12), code.talks (May 15), DevFest Belgium (Jun 22), DevFest Paris (Jul 1), Frontmania (May 31)
quote: Frontmania 31-05-2026; code.talks 15-05-2026; React Day Berlin 12-08-2026; DevFest Belgium 22-06-2026; DevFest Paris 01-07-2026.

claim: DevFest Paris 2026 has an explicit Frontend / UI / UX track covering Angular, Vue, JavaScript, TypeScript, React, design thinking, Figma
quote: Frontend / UI / UX track: Angular, VueJs, JavaScript, Typescript, React, Design thinking, Figma.

claim: React Day Berlin 2026 is the 7th edition; 2026 themes focus on AI integrations and system design, full-stack engineering, reliability, and long-term maintainability
quote: React Day Berlin will be holding its 7th edition in 2026, covering a wide range of topics with significant focus on AI integrations and system design, full-stack engineering, reliability, and long-term maintainability.

claim: Official DevFest Belgium 2026 site lists the conference but date is shown as 'à définir' (to be defined) as of 2026-04-30
Vue.js Amsterdam 2026 took place March 12–13, 2026 at Theater Amsterdam — already past as of 2026-04-30
quote: VueJS Amsterdam — Vue.js Conference — March 12-13 2026 — Theater Amsterdam.

claim: React Paris 2026 (organized by BeJS) ran March 26–27, 2026 in Paris; CFP form is no longer accepting responses
quote: React Paris 2026, March 26-27 in Paris. CFP opened 26-11-2025; the Call for Papers form is no longer accepting responses.

claim: Voxxed Days Amsterdam 2026 took place April 1–2, 2026 at Pathé Amsterdam Noord — already past
quote: Voxxed Days Amsterdam 2026 — April 1–2, 2026 at Pathé Amsterdam (North).

claim: Devoxx France 2026 ran April 22–24, 2026 at Palais des Congrès Porte Maillot, Paris; 2026 CFP closed January 11, 2026
quote: Devoxx France 14ème édition — du 22 au 24 avril 2026 — Palais des Congrès, Porte Maillot. CFP closes 11 janvier 2026 à 23h59 (CET).

claim: dotJS 2026 takes place September 18, 2026 at Folies Bergère, Paris; CFP closed April 28, 2026 at 6 PM CET
quote: dotJS 2026 — September 18 at Folies Bergère in Paris. CFP open until April 28th 2026 at 6 PM CET.

claim: JSNation 2026 CFP deadline was March 2, 2026 23:59 UTC (closed); event takes place June 11 & 15, 2026 in Amsterdam (Kromhouthal)
quote: JSNation 2026 — Deadline: March 02, 2026 23:59 UTC. CFP closed. June 11 & 15, 2026 in Amsterdam (Kromhouthal) and online.

claim: React Summit 2026 takes place June 11–15, 2026 in Amsterdam with 51 speakers and 52 talks already scheduled, suggesting CFP is no longer accepting submissions
quote: React Summit 2026 — June 11-15, 2026 — Amsterdam & Online. 51 speakers, 52 talks already scheduled.

claim: NG-DE (the Angular Conference in Germany) is cancelled for 2026; site directs visitors to past edition recordings
quote: NG-DE is cancelled. Thanks to participants — watch talks from past editions of the conference.

claim: Devoxx Belgium 2026 runs October 5–9, 2026 in Antwerp; CFP opens June 1, 2026 and closes July 17, 2026
quote: Devoxx Belgium 2026 — Monday October 5th until Friday the 9th in Antwerp. CFP opens Monday June 1st and runs until Friday July 17th.
